name: form-layout
description: Standard form layout with fields and validation
code:
<form>
  <Field>
    <FieldLabel>Email</FieldLabel>
    <Input type="email" placeholder="Enter your email" />
  </Field>

  <Field>
    <FieldLabel>Password</FieldLabel>
    <Input type="password" placeholder="Enter your password" />
  </Field>

  <Button type="submit">Sign In</Button>
</form>
notes: Use Field component to group labels with inputs

name: card-layout
code:
<Card>
  <Heading>Card Title</Heading>
  <Text>
    Card content goes here with descriptive information.
  </Text>
  <Button>Action</Button>
</Card>
notes: Use cards for grouping related content
Keep card content concise and focused
